title: Basic JavaScript Arrow Functions
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Arrow Functions. Focus on implementing Arrow function syntax correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Arrow Functions
description: Create a function that uses Arrow function syntax and Implicit return together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Arrow Functions Project
description: Build a small application that applies Arrow function syntax, Implicit return, Lexical this binding in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Arrow Functions
description: The following code has bugs related to Arrow function syntax. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Arrow Functions
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Arrow function syntax and Implicit return.
